Registry / Terms / electronic device

electronic device

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #00598 · 30 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 23 distinct definitions — harmonise.

(e device employing electronic sub-assemblies and performing a specific function. T.2.2
device employing electronic sub-assemblies and performing a specific function. An electronic device is usually manufactured as a separate unit and is capable of being independently tested (e.g. an instrument comprising of photocells for detecting leather or a camera for image scanning and providing area measurement with digital indication)
